title: Your automation questions, answered!
excerpt: Are you able to join us for our first community hour with monday.com knowledge experts Sarah and Ilan?  As part of our community hour, we open up the stage to our community and  give you the opportunity to ask your autom…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you able to join us for our first community hour with monday.com knowledge experts Sarah and Ilan? As part of our community hour, we open up the stage to our community and give you the opportunity to ask your automations questions before, during and after the event.

**Do you have a question about automations that you have been struggling with, ask it in the comment below for our team to answer! **

Frame 12611596451067×604 124 KB

posts.author: sandraPR (Sandra)
posts.cookedHtml: Where can I find the recording of the “Community Hour: All About Automations” webinar?
